svg.text: Voice-reactive listening waveform. AI icon for transcribing. Stop stays on the right. Same 144 x 32px size.
All pills remain 144 x 32px. No trailing dots. No resize.
Transcribing is system work, not live audio display.
Every state uses the same capsule size and centered text.
AI icon pulses. Right stop is clickable.
Immediate state change. Stop becomes disabled.
Use when nothing should be inserted.
Use when usable partial transcript remains.
Use when final text was inserted.
Listening waveform is data-driven from mic amplitude.
Transcribing uses the AI icon, not the waveform.
Right stop is clickable only while stoppable.
Stopping uses left spinner + muted right stop.
No textual ellipsis and no trailing non-clickable dots.
